substitution_flags.agent_b_product: Agent 6: G-Cast L-Shaped Wall / Precast Sheet Piles
substitution_flags.resolution_logic: Height & soil pressure determine winner. <2m = AAC. >2m = G-Cast. Marine = Sheet Piles.
Fire rating, weight, speed, cost. Fire-rated/fast-track = AAC. Budget traditional = clay brick.
Span, weight, aesthetics. Large industrial span = metal. Residential pitched roof = tiles. Green/thermal = PU Green Roofing.
Scope/geography. Synergy M5 = specialist deep ELV. Engenious = bundled with M&E package. Orchestrator should recommend the BU already contracted for other M&E scope.
Same logic — bundle with existing M&E contractor. Vino = product supplier. Engenious = design-install contractor. Can be complementary (Vino supplies, Engenious installs).
Synergy M5 = specialist AV/ELV. Engenious = full managed infrastructure. Complex projects may need both.
Budget tier determines. Standard housing = Faber. Mid-range to premium = Elba. Premium / designer = Rubine. Orchestrator uses project tier signal.
High-rise steel frame = composite deck. Low-rise RC frame = AAC floor panel.
G-Cast = manufacturer. PPCH = trader/distributor. May be same physical product. Orchestrator prioritises G-Cast.
